reasoning: The control 'Information Security During Disruption' focuses on ensuring security measures are in place during disruptions. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring audit logging is enabled to track changes and incidents, admission controllers enforce security policies to prevent misconfigurations, network policies restrict ingress to prevent unauthorized access, and RBAC is configured to enforce least privilege access. These measures help maintain security posture during potential disruptions.
title: Information Security During Disruption
